node.text: Caroline had a not-so-great experience on a hike where she ran into a group of religious conservatives who upset her.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "religion belief faith") on Session 12 (Score: 0.62)

node.text: Caroline finds empowerment in making a positive difference in someone's life by offering love and support.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "religion belief faith") on Session 19 (Score: 0.74)

node.text: Caroline's vision for the future includes creating a safe and loving home for needy kids to experience love and acceptance.

node.text: Caroline values having people around her who accept and support her.

node.text: Caroline received a special necklace as a gift from her grandmother in Sweden, symbolizing love, faith, and strength.
